context.projectOverview: Chat Interrupt / Approve / Steer (Phase 2) — Sprint 6 FINALE: hygiene cleanup + full /help + consolidated docs (README + docs/chat-steer.md incl. the single-careful-run limitation) + a full-loop e2e test. Integration/polish sprint; minimal new abstraction.

completedSprints.summary: RunState grammar, CarefulSidecar /careful, --approve-gates, RunSpawner careful spawn (--approve-gates post-research,post-plan,post-sprint).
ApprovalReader, ApprovalCursor announce-once, handleTurn surfacing prelude, RunState input-required reflection, roster waiting=<gate>.
/approve, /reject+feedback, NL; handleApprove/handleReject reuse saveApproved/saveRejected; RunState clear-on-resolve.
src/state/guidance.ts (appendGuidance/drainGuidance/hasRunDir + exported safeSegment); /tell + NL; additive pipeline guidance read point.
src/state/pause.ts (setPaused/clearPaused/isPaused + waitWhilePaused injected-clock); /pause//resume + NL; additive cooperative-pause gate; no-kill distinct from /stop.

relevantFiles: src/chat/chat-session.ts (CLEANUP HOOK SITE: the completion poll prelude at ~:140-146 — insert cleanup after :146, BEFORE the ~:148 approval prelude; best-effort, never throw into the turn)
src/chat/completion-tailer.ts (how terminal completions for runId R are detected — cleanup keys off the same signal)
src/state/approval-state.ts (deletePending(projectRoot, id) ~:138 for stale pending markers; listPending to find a run's pending markers by correlated runId)
src/state/guidance.ts + src/state/pause.ts (guidance.jsonl + paused.json paths under .bober/runs/<id>/ to unlink best-effort)
src/chat/slash-commands.ts (HELP_TEXT at ~:17-31 ALREADY lists the full set — sc-6-6 is TEST-ONLY; just assert each command appears)
src/chat/chat-session-{spawn,approval,steer,completion}.test.ts (the e2e harness helpers: injectPending/injectRunningRun/injectCompletion/makeMarker + the calls-capturing spawn for --approve-gates)
README.md (chat section to extend with the steer subsection) + docs/teams.md + .bober/research/20260614-chattable-team-of-agents-platform.md Phase 2 (cross-refs for docs/chat-steer.md)

keyInvariants: CLEANUP IS BEST-EFFORT: cleanupTerminalRun(projectRoot, runId) must tolerate ENOENT and NEVER throw into a chat turn (wrap in try/catch, mirror the Phase 1 completion-prelude try/catch). It runs when the chat process observes a run reach a terminal status (completed/aborted) at the completion-prelude hook (~:140-146, insert after :146).

CLEANUP SCOPE: for terminal runId R — deletePending for R's correlated pending marker(s); unlink .bober/runs/R/guidance.jsonl and .bober/runs/R/paused.json (best-effort); clear the chat-owned RunState pending/paused fields (pendingCheckpointId/pendingPrompt/pendingSince/pausedAt) and leave the terminal status as-is via writeRunState.

CORRELATION CAVEAT = THE DOCUMENTED LIMITATION: pending markers are checkpointId-keyed in a SHARED .bober/approvals dir (not runId-scoped). Correlating a pending marker to runId R is exactly why only ONE careful run at a time is supported this phase. The docs MUST state this limitation + the runId-scoped-marker follow-up (sc-6-7).

ADDITIVE/NO-REGRESSION: do NOT change phase order or the pipeline; do NOT implement runId-scoped markers (follow-up only); do NOT add cockpit/IDE surfacing or any new steer capability. /help already lists the full set — sc-6-6 just verifies it.

E2E IS THE INTEGRATION PROOF (sc-6-5): stub the pipeline/run loop + RunSpawner (NO real LLM, no network, temp dirs). Drive: setCareful(on) -> spawn (assert --approve-gates in args) -> write synthetic post-plan.pending.json (simulate child at gate) -> turn asserts surfaced + RunState input-required -> handleTell asserts guidance entry -> handleApprove('post-plan') asserts approved.json + pending cleared -> simulate post-sprint pending -> handlePause asserts paused.json + RunState paused -> handleResume asserts cleared -> simulate completion marker -> assert cleanup removed stale markers + RunState fields. Assert at the disk-artifact + RunState level.
successCriteriaSummary: sc-6-1 build; sc-6-2 typecheck; sc-6-3 tests incl hygiene + e2e; sc-6-4 completion/abort cleans stale pending+guidance+paused markers + clears RunState pending/paused fields (unit test for completed AND aborted); sc-6-5 full-loop e2e (stubbed, offline) asserting markers + RunState transitions at each step; sc-6-6 /help lists full set (/careful,/approve,/reject,/tell,/pause,/resume,/stop,/runs,/help,/exit) — test-only; sc-6-7 README chat section + docs/chat-steer.md document /careful + curated gates (post-research/post-plan/post-sprint) + approve/reject/tell/pause/resume + EXPLICIT single-careful-run limitation + runId-scoped follow-up.
principlesRef: .bober/principles.md (ESM/NodeNext, .js imports, no SDK types outside src/providers/, async fs only, best-effort unlink tolerating ENOENT, collocated *.test.ts, no fs mocks, no network, conventional commit bober(sprint-6): ...)
notesForGenerator: Baseline after Sprint 5 is 2130 tests passing. Known PRE-EXISTING flake in src/mcp/tools/list-active-runs.test.ts (intermittent ENOTEMPTY cleanup race; passes on re-run/isolation) — this Sprint 6 is the documented place it was flagged, but the contract does NOT ask you to fix it; if it's the ONLY failure on your run, re-run once to confirm green and note it. You may optionally harden that test's temp-dir cleanup if trivial and clearly the race, but do not let it expand scope or risk the sprint — prefer noting it. Docs: README chat section + docs/chat-steer.md are YOUR deliverable (the per-sprint documenters intentionally left these for you). Cross-reference research Phase 2 + docs/teams.md. `npm run update-all` to sync .claude copies is a HUMAN follow-up — mention it in docs, do not run it.
